allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Auto sign-in after registration, use token returned by register API:*)

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('/Users/fad/_repos/DipFinder/data/ticker-tags-seed.json'\); console.log\('Total tickers:', data.length\); const sectors = {}; const industries = {}; const factors = {}; const themes = {}; data.forEach\(t => { sectors[t.sector] = \(sectors[t.sector]||0\)+1; industries[t.industry] = \(industries[t.industry]||0\)+1; \(t.factors||[]\).forEach\(f => factors[f]=\(factors[f]||0\)+1\); \(t.themes||[]\).forEach\(th => themes[th]=\(themes[th]||0\)+1\); }\); console.log\('\\nBy sector:'\); Object.entries\(sectors\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k+':',v\)\); console.log\('\\nFactors:'\); Object.entries\(factors\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k+':',v\)\); console.log\('\\nThemes:'\); Object.entries\(themes\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k+':',v\)\);")
